Mtn For Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Adam G. Khan, Esq. of McNamara Ney Beatty Slattery Borges & Ambacher LLP, Tel. 925.939.5330, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was not argued, therefore, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WALTER ROSENFIELD'S Motion For Good Faith Settlement is Granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
